description:
## Smell

Duplicated Code (Fowler, *Refactoring*). The four Issue List WebDriver
specs each redeclare the same typed-RPC interfaces, the same
`executeAsync` lambdas, and the same DOM assertion helpers. The copies
have already drifted (e.g., `arguments_: object` typed signature is
present in `issue-list.empty.spec.ts` and `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`
but absent from `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts`).

## Background

`bsm-kia.5` produced four specs that each independently need to talk to
the typed workspace transport and assert the rendered sidebar / issue
row:

- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts:40-180` redeclares
  `interface WorkspaceSwitchResponse`, `interface WorkspaceStateResponse`,
  `invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch`, `invokeWorkspaceState`,
  `issueRowSelector`, `expectIssueVisible`, `expectSidebarWorkspacePath`.
- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.success.spec.ts:32-160` redeclares the same
  five symbols (plus an extra top-level `state` wrapper).
- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.empty.spec.ts` and
  `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` redeclare the same
  surfaces again, with subtle signature drift on the typed-transport
  `executeAsync` lambda.

## What to build

Extract a single `e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts` (or similar — see
ADR 0006 for prior-art path) that owns:

- The `WorkspaceSwitchResponse` and `WorkspaceStateResponse` interfaces
  re-exported from the generated bindings where possible.
- One `invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch(candidatePath: string)` and one
  `invokeWorkspaceState()` helper with one canonical
  `arguments_: object` signature.
- One `issueRowSelector(title)`, one `expectIssueVisible(title)`, one
  `expectSidebarWorkspacePath(expected)`, and one
  `expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent()` (currently added per-file).

The four specs import these helpers; nothing in `e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts`
redeclares any of the above types or functions.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `rg "interface WorkspaceSwitchResponse|interface WorkspaceStateResponse|invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch|invokeWorkspaceState|issueRowSelector|expectIssueVisible|expectSidebarWorkspacePath|expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent" e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts`
      returns zero hits in spec files.
- [ ] Each helper has exactly one canonical implementation; the helpers'
      signatures match the generated binding types.
- [ ] The four specs continue to assert everything they assert today
      (verified by `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and
      `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` passing without per-spec edits).
- [ ] No spec-local type drift between `arguments_: object` and the
      `Record<string, unknown>` style.

## Out of scope

- Refactoring the launcher, the harness, or the fixtures.
- Adding new assertions or scenarios.
- Changing the generated bindings or the typed RPC contract.
title: Collapse duplicate Workspace RPC and sidebar helpers across the four e2e specs
